  C40DFA: 00              .BYTE $00 ;X Position, relative to sprite
  C40DFB: 80              .BYTE $80
  C40DFC:             ; Format:
  C40DFC:             ; 00XX YYYY
  C40DFC:             ; Valid XX:
  C40DFC:             ;   01 = Show frame described at $YYYY ($0000 for nothing)
  C40DFC:             ;   02 = Wait YYYY frames
  C40DFC:             ;   03 = Jump to $YYYY
  C40DFC:             ENTITY_OVERLAY_SWEATING:
  C40DFC: 01 00 8E 0D     SHOWFRAME .LOWORD(ENTITY_OVERLAY_SWEATING_FRAME_1)
  C40E00: 02 00 08 00     DELAYNEXTFRAME $0008
  C40E04: 01 00 98 0D     SHOWFRAME .LOWORD(ENTITY_OVERLAY_SWEATING_FRAME_2)
  C40E08: 02 00 08 00     DELAYNEXTFRAME $0008
  C40E0C: 01 00 00 00     SHOWFRAME $0000
  C40E10: 02 00 10 00     DELAYNEXTFRAME $0010
  C40E14: 01 00 A2 0D     SHOWFRAME .LOWORD(ENTITY_OVERLAY_SWEATING_FRAME_3)
  C40E18: 02 00 08 00     DELAYNEXTFRAME $0008
  C40E1C: 01 00 AC 0D     SHOWFRAME .LOWORD(ENTITY_OVERLAY_SWEATING_FRAME_4)
  C40E20: 02 00 08 00     DELAYNEXTFRAME $0008
  C40E24: 01 00 00 00     SHOWFRAME $0000
  C40E28: 02 00 10 00     DELAYNEXTFRAME $0010
  C40E2C: 03 00 FC 0D     JUMPTO .LOWORD(ENTITY_OVERLAY_SWEATING)
  C40E30:             ENTITY_OVERLAY_MUSHROOMIZED:
  C40E30: 01 00 B6 0D     SHOWFRAME .LOWORD(ENTITY_OVERLAY_MUSHROOMIZED_FRAME_1)
  C40E34: 02 00 FF 00     DELAYNEXTFRAME $00FF
  C40E38: 03 00 30 0E     JUMPTO .LOWORD(ENTITY_OVERLAY_MUSHROOMIZED)
  C40E3C:             ENTITY_OVERLAY_RIPPLE:
  C40E3C: 01 00 C0 0D     SHOWFRAME .LOWORD(ENTITY_OVERLAY_RIPPLE_FRAME_1)
  C40E40: 02 00 0C 00     DELAYNEXTFRAME $000C
  C40E44: 01 00 CA 0D     SHOWFRAME .LOWORD(ENTITY_OVERLAY_RIPPLE_FRAME_2)
  C40E48: 02 00 0C 00     DELAYNEXTFRAME $000C
  C40E4C: 03 00 3C 0E     JUMPTO .LOWORD(ENTITY_OVERLAY_RIPPLE)
  C40E50:             ENTITY_OVERLAY_BIG_RIPPLE:
  C40E50: 01 00 D4 0D     SHOWFRAME .LOWORD(ENTITY_OVERLAY_BIG_RIPPLE_FRAME_1)
  C40E54: 02 00 0C 00     DELAYNEXTFRAME $000C
  C40E58: 01 00 E8 0D     SHOWFRAME .LOWORD(ENTITY_OVERLAY_BIG_RIPPLE_FRAME_2)
  C40E5C: 02 00 0C 00     DELAYNEXTFRAME $000C

  C4345B: C5 04           CMP @VIRTUAL04

>>> audio/get_audio_bank.asm
  C4CEDD:             GET_AUDIO_BANK:
  C4CEDD: C2 31           BEGIN_C_FUNCTION
  C4CEDF:                 STACK_RESERVE_VARS
  C4CEDF:                 STACK_RESERVE_INT16
  C4CEDF:                 STACK_RESERVE_PARAM_INT16
  C4CEDF: 0B 48 7B 69     END_STACK_VARS
          F0 FF 5B 68 
  C4CEE7: 85 0E           STA @LOCAL00
  C4CEE9: A9 FF FF        LDA #.LOWORD(-1)
  C4CEEC: 8D F8 B6        STA SEQUENCE_PACK_MASK
  C4CEEF: A5 0E           LDA @LOCAL00
  C4CEF1:             .IF .DEFINED(JPN)
  C4CEF1: 18              CLC ;mother 2's audio pack addresses are relative to the first bank audio packs are stored in, for some reason
  C4CEF2: 69 E2 00        ADC #^AUDIO_PACK_108
  C4CEF5:             .ENDIF
  C4CEF5: 2B 60           END_C_FUNCTION

>>> audio/initialize_music_subsystem.asm
  C4CEF7:             INITIALIZE_MUSIC_SUBSYSTEM:
  C4CEF7: C2 31           BEGIN_C_FUNCTION_FAR
  C4CEF9:                 STACK_RESERVE_VARS
  C4CEF9:                 STACK_RESERVE_INT16
  C4CEF9:                 STACK_RESERVE_INT16
  C4CEF9: 0B 7B 69 EE     END_STACK_VARS
          FF 5B       
  C4CEFF: A9 FF FF        LDA #$FFFF
  C4CF02: 8D F2 B6        STA CURRENT_SEQUENCE_PACK
  C4CF05: 8D EE B6        STA CURRENT_PRIMARY_SAMPLE_PACK
  C4CF08: AF A7 CA C4     LDA f:MUSIC_DATASET_TABLE + (0 * .SIZEOF(pack_table_entry)) + pack_table_entry::sequence_pack
  C4CF0C: 29 FF 00        AND #$00FF
  C4CF0F: 85 10           STA @LOCAL01
  C4CF11: 8D F4 B6        STA UNKNOWN_7EB543
  C4CF14: 8D F0 B6        STA CURRENT_SECONDARY_SAMPLE_PACK
  C4CF17: A9 E2 CC 85     LOADPTR MUSIC_PACK_POINTER_TABLE, @VIRTUAL06
          06 A9 C4 00 
          85 08       
  C4CF21: A5 10           LDA @LOCAL01
  C4CF23: 85 04 0A 65     OPTIMIZED_MULT @VIRTUAL04, .SIZEOF(music_pack_pointer)
          04          
  C4CF28: A8              TAY
  C4CF29: 84 0E           STY @LOCAL00
  C4CF2B: 98              TYA
  C4CF2C: A6 06 86 0A     MOVE_INTX @VIRTUAL06, @VIRTUAL0A
          A6 08 86 0C 
  C4CF34: 18              CLC
  C4CF35: 65 0A           ADC @VIRTUAL0A
  C4CF37: 85 0A           STA @VIRTUAL0A
  C4CF39: A7 0A           LDA [@VIRTUAL0A] ;music_pack_pointer::bank
  C4CF3B: 29 FF 00        AND #$00FF
  C4CF3E: 20 DD CE        JSR GET_AUDIO_BANK
  C4CF41: AA              TAX
  C4CF42: A4 0E           LDY @LOCAL00
  C4CF44: 98              TYA
  C4CF45: 1A              INC
  C4CF46: 18              CLC
  C4CF47: 65 06           ADC @VIRTUAL06
  C4CF49: 85 06           STA @VIRTUAL06
  C4CF4B: A7 06           LDA [@VIRTUAL06] ;music_pack_pointer::addr
  C4CF4D: 2D F8 B6        AND SEQUENCE_PACK_MASK
  C4CF50: 22 E5 AA C0     JSL LOAD_SPC700_DATA
  C4CF54: A9 01 00        LDA #$0001
  C4CF57: 8D FA B6        STA ENABLE_AUTO_SECTOR_MUSIC_CHANGES
  C4CF5A: 2B 6B           END_C_FUNCTION

>>> audio/change_music.asm
  C4CF5C:             CHANGE_MUSIC:
  C4CF5C: C2 31           BEGIN_C_FUNCTION_FAR
  C4CF5E:                 STACK_RESERVE_VARS
  C4CF5E:                 STACK_RESERVE_PARAM_INT16
  C4CF5E:                 STACK_RESERVE_INT16
  C4CF5E:                 STACK_RESERVE_INT16
  C4CF5E:                 STACK_RESERVE_INT16
  C4CF5E: 0B 48 7B 69     END_STACK_VARS
          EC FF 5B 68 
  C4CF66: AA              TAX
  C4CF67: 86 12           STX @LOCAL02
  C4CF69: EC EC B6        CPX CURRENT_MUSIC_TRACK
  C4CF6C: D0 03 4C B5     BEQL @RETURN
          D0          
  C4CF71: AD 8A B6        LDA DISABLED_TRANSITIONS
  C4CF74: D0 04           BNE @UNKNOWN1
  C4CF76: 22 E0 AB C0     JSL PLAY_SOUND_UNKNOWN0
  C4CF7A:             @UNKNOWN1:
  C4CF7A: A6 12           LDX @LOCAL02
  C4CF7C:                 ; Sound stone recordings should play seamlessly
  C4CF7C: E0 A0 00        CPX #MUSIC::SOUNDSTONE_RECORDING_GIANT_STEP
  C4CF7F: 90 07           BCC @STOP_MUSIC
  C4CF81: E0 A7 00        CPX #MUSIC::SOUNDSTONE_RECORDING_FIRE_SPRING
  C4CF84: 90 0D F0 0B     BLTEQ @DONT_STOP_MUSIC
  C4CF88:             @STOP_MUSIC:
  C4CF88: A9 01 00        LDA #$0001
  C4CF8B: 22 EB AB C0     JSL UNKNOWN_C0AC0C
  C4CF8F: 22 A5 AB C0     JSL STOP_MUSIC
  C4CF93:             @DONT_STOP_MUSIC:
  C4CF93: A6 12           LDX @LOCAL02
  C4CF95: 8E EC B6        STX CURRENT_MUSIC_TRACK
  C4CF98: 9B              TXY
  C4CF99: 88              DEY
  C4CF9A: 84 10           STY @LOCAL01
  C4CF9C: 98              TYA
  C4CF9D: 85 04 0A 65     OPTIMIZED_MULT @VIRTUAL04, .SIZEOF(pack_table_entry)
          04          
  C4CFA2: AA              TAX
  C4CFA3: BF A5 CA C4     LDA f:MUSIC_DATASET_TABLE,X ;pack_table_entry::primary_sample_pack
  C4CFA7: 29 FF 00        AND #$00FF
  C4CFAA: 85 0E           STA @LOCAL00
  C4CFAC: CD EE B6        CMP CURRENT_PRIMARY_SAMPLE_PACK
  C4CFAF: F0 42           BEQ @SKIP_DATA_LOAD_1
  C4CFB1: C9 FF 00        CMP #$00FF
  C4CFB4: F0 3D           BEQ @SKIP_DATA_LOAD_1
  C4CFB6: 8D EE B6        STA CURRENT_PRIMARY_SAMPLE_PACK
  C4CFB9: A9 E2 CC 85     LOADPTR MUSIC_PACK_POINTER_TABLE, @VIRTUAL06
          06 A9 C4 00 
          85 08       
  C4CFC3: A5 0E           LDA @LOCAL00
  C4CFC5: 85 04 0A 65     OPTIMIZED_MULT @VIRTUAL04, .SIZEOF(music_pack_pointer)
          04          
  C4CFCA: 85 02           STA @VIRTUAL02
  C4CFCC: A6 06 86 0A     MOVE_INTX @VIRTUAL06, @VIRTUAL0A
          A6 08 86 0C 
  C4CFD4: 18              CLC
  C4CFD5: 65 0A           ADC @VIRTUAL0A
  C4CFD7: 85 0A           STA @VIRTUAL0A
  C4CFD9: A7 0A           LDA [@VIRTUAL0A] ;music_pack_pointer::bank
  C4CFDB: 29 FF 00        AND #$00FF
  C4CFDE: 20 DD CE        JSR GET_AUDIO_BANK
  C4CFE1: AA              TAX
  C4CFE2: A5 02           LDA @VIRTUAL02
  C4CFE4: 1A              INC
  C4CFE5: 18              CLC
  C4CFE6: 65 06           ADC @VIRTUAL06
  C4CFE8: 85 06           STA @VIRTUAL06
  C4CFEA: A7 06           LDA [@VIRTUAL06] ;music_pack_pointer::addr
  C4CFEC: 2D F8 B6        AND SEQUENCE_PACK_MASK
  C4CFEF: 22 E5 AA C0     JSL LOAD_SPC700_DATA
  C4CFF3:             @SKIP_DATA_LOAD_1:
  C4CFF3: A4 10           LDY @LOCAL01
  C4CFF5: 98              TYA
  C4CFF6: 85 04 0A 65     OPTIMIZED_MULT @VIRTUAL04, .SIZEOF(pack_table_entry)
          04          
  C4CFFB: AA              TAX
  C4CFFC: E8              INX
  C4CFFD: BF A5 CA C4     LDA f:MUSIC_DATASET_TABLE,X ;pack_table_entry::secondary_sample_pack
  C4D001: 29 FF 00        AND #$00FF
  C4D004: 85 0E           STA @LOCAL00
  C4D006: CD F0 B6        CMP CURRENT_SECONDARY_SAMPLE_PACK
  C4D009: F0 47           BEQ @SKIP_DATA_LOAD_2
  C4D00B: C9 FF 00        CMP #$00FF
  C4D00E: F0 42           BEQ @SKIP_DATA_LOAD_2
  C4D010: CD F4 B6        CMP UNKNOWN_7EB543
  C4D013: F0 3D           BEQ @SKIP_DATA_LOAD_2
  C4D015: 8D F0 B6        STA CURRENT_SECONDARY_SAMPLE_PACK
  C4D018: A9 E2 CC 85     LOADPTR MUSIC_PACK_POINTER_TABLE, @VIRTUAL06
          06 A9 C4 00 
          85 08       
  C4D022: A5 0E           LDA @LOCAL00
  C4D024: 85 04 0A 65     OPTIMIZED_MULT @VIRTUAL04, .SIZEOF(music_pack_pointer)
          04          
  C4D029: 85 02           STA @VIRTUAL02
  C4D02B: A6 06 86 0A     MOVE_INTX @VIRTUAL06, @VIRTUAL0A
          A6 08 86 0C 
  C4D033: 18              CLC
  C4D034: 65 0A           ADC @VIRTUAL0A
  C4D036: 85 0A           STA @VIRTUAL0A
  C4D038: A7 0A           LDA [@VIRTUAL0A] ;music_pack_pointer::bank
  C4D03A: 29 FF 00        AND #$00FF
  C4D03D: 20 DD CE        JSR GET_AUDIO_BANK
  C4D040: AA              TAX
  C4D041: A5 02           LDA @VIRTUAL02
  C4D043: 1A              INC
  C4D044: 18              CLC
  C4D045: 65 06           ADC @VIRTUAL06
  C4D047: 85 06           STA @VIRTUAL06
  C4D049: A7 06           LDA [@VIRTUAL06] ;music_pack_pointer::addr
  C4D04B: 2D F8 B6        AND SEQUENCE_PACK_MASK
  C4D04E: 22 E5 AA C0     JSL LOAD_SPC700_DATA
  C4D052:             @SKIP_DATA_LOAD_2:
  C4D052: A4 10           LDY @LOCAL01
  C4D054: 98              TYA
  C4D055: 85 04 0A 65     OPTIMIZED_MULT @VIRTUAL04, .SIZEOF(pack_table_entry)

  C4D05A: AA              TAX

  C4D05C: E8              INX
  C4D05D: BF A5 CA C4     LDA f:MUSIC_DATASET_TABLE,X ;pack_table_entry::sequence_pack
  C4D061: 29 FF 00        AND #$00FF
  C4D064: 85 0E           STA @LOCAL00
  C4D066: CD F2 B6        CMP CURRENT_SEQUENCE_PACK
  C4D069: F0 42           BEQ @SKIP_DATA_LOAD_3
  C4D06B: C9 FF 00        CMP #$00FF
  C4D06E: F0 3D           BEQ @SKIP_DATA_LOAD_3
  C4D070: 8D F2 B6        STA CURRENT_SEQUENCE_PACK
  C4D073: A9 E2 CC 85     LOADPTR MUSIC_PACK_POINTER_TABLE, @VIRTUAL06
